errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Control tower dashboard JSON has not updated in 26 consecutive runs (~52h of failures). Rate limit on Anthropic Sonnet exhausted repeatedly. [13 jobs affected]
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku in job payload to reduce token cost and rate limit pressure.

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl summary failed due to misconfigured delivery target. The 'to' field in delivery config is malformed — channel C0AMWT9JB5Y is set in channel field but not in 'to'.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery to set to: 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' in the delivery object.

errors.meaning: Cron job failed with 1 consecutive errors
errors.suggestedFix: Check cron job logs for details
